observed_counts.description: Observed counts from this year's inspection of 500 units: 20 scrapped, 25 reworked, and 455 acceptable (500 - 20 - 25).

expected_proportions.description: Expected proportions from last year's manufacturing process: 3% scrapped, 6% reworked, 91% acceptable, used to compute expected counts for the Chi-square test.

n.description: Total number of units inspected this year, used to compute expected counts.
